LanguageData.Playwright.Settings.EnablePlaywrightButt: Enable Playwright button in main menu
LanguageData.Playwright.ErrorSavingScenario: An error occurred while compiling your Playwright into a Scenario. Scenario has not been saved. Check the error logs for more details.
LanguageData.Playwright.ScenarioSaved: Your Scenario has been saved successfully.
LanguageData.Playwright.ScenarioSaved.1: Do you want to go to the New Colony screen now?
LanguageData.Playwright.ConfirmReset: This will reset your Boons, Factions, Win Conditions and Special Conditions to the selected Origin's defaults. Are you sure?
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.Intro.Welcome.1: Use the tabs on the left to start composing your scenario.
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.Intro.Welcome.2: When you're done, click "Save Scenario" to save your Playwright as a new scenario.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.SuggestedIdeo.Help: You are not required to pick the suggested Ideoligion. Go wild!
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.Origin.Welcome: Choose an Origin. This will determine who you are, and why you are here.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Origins.Import.Des: Choose an existing scenario as a starting point.
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.Boons.Welcome: Choose your Boons. This will determine extra stuff you start out with (if any).
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Boons.Shuttle.Desc: Start with a pre-built Passenger Shuttle from Odyssey, and enough Chemfuel to fill it up.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Boons.Shuttle.Summ: Start with 1x Passenger Shuttle and 400x Chemfuel
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Boons.BionicArm.De: Each starting colonist has a Bionic Arm implanted on a random side.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Boons.BionicArm.Su: Starting colonists have a Bionic Arm implant.
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.Factions.Welcome: Set up the factions that exist in the world, and how they feel about you.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Faction.Specific.F: If enabled, faction goodwill is locked. They cannot be swayed.
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.WinConditions.Welcome:
Choose your Win Conditions. This will determine the ways you can see the victory screen and credits.
Consider these long-term goals to strive for during your playthrough.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Ship:
Escape the planet on a ship to the stars. This could be a ship you build yourself, or perhaps you can procure a way out from the locals. You win when at least 1 colonist escapes the planet on a built starship. The default experience.
Removing this will disable the Journey Offer, and you will not be able to start the Ship Reactor. You can still build the ship.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Roya:
Escape the planet on an Imperial Shuttle. This will require appeasing one of the Empire's most prestigious individuals, that being the High Stellarch. You win when at least 1 colonist escapes the planet on an Imperial Shuttle. The default Royalty experience.
Removing this will disable the Royal Ascent quest.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Arch:
Awaken the Archonexus Core by acquiring all 3 map pieces and then awakening the core. You win when the Archonexus Core is awakened. The default Ideology experience.
Removing this will disable the Archonexus quests.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Mono: Work your way up into Metal Hell, and choose to embrace the void or sever its connection with the world. The default Anomaly experience.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Conq: Ally with or destroy every possible faction on the planet. Factions without settlements (such as Mechanoids or Insectoids) are not counted. You win when the only remaining settlements on the map are owned by either you, or an allied faction.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Colo: Have a certain number of colonists. Temporary colonists (from quests or otherwise) are not counted. You win when your permanent colonist count equals or exceeds the goal. (Mind the potential lag when setting the goal)
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Roya: Have a certain number of colonists with the chosen Royal Title with the Shattered Empire. Temporary colonists (from quests or otherwise) are not counted. You win when the amount of permanent colonists with the specified title with the Shattered Empire equals or exceeds the goal.
